meaning: adj.(运动比赛)未获胜的,未赢的,每次交战皆输的
examples: The crucial victory put an end to an awful8game winless run and drew a line under what had been a turbulent week for the capital city club.
Wilson was still in disbelief that his shot of ending his15-race winless drought was done when his suspension was bent during the caution period.
The Scot also said that he never doubted Westwood's ability, even when he endured his lowest point during a winless period between 2004 and 2006.
All that has added up to a winless start with the New York Mets.
The defeat extended Brighton's winless run to seven matches and kept them in the bottom two.
